ksa_text: Ability to manage the full data lifecycle including collection, curation, transformation, and assurance to ensure data quality at each stage.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in secure test plan design (e. g. unit, integration, system, acceptance).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Processes are in place for robust engagement with relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Skill in secure test plan design (e. g. unit, integration, system, acceptance).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Quality. This ability KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Quality), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.428). External validation of this ability KSA for the Director of Data Quality role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK Data Quality Management chapter and industry surveys confirm data quality competencies for quality-focused leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Data Quality for the Director of Data Quality is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Data Quality ability KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Quality at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
